glosses.zh-Hans: 查阅（如在词典中）; 像（某人）
glosses.yue: 查（字典/資料）; 似（某人）
glosses.nl: opzoeken (in een woordenboek/boek); op iemand lijken
glosses.ro: a căuta (în dicționar/carte); a semăna cu (cineva)
glosses.ja: 辞書で調べる; （人に）似ている

translations.en: I have to quickly look that up.
translations.fr: Je dois vérifier ça vite fait.
translations.he: אני צריך לבדוק את זה מהר.
translations.vi: Tôi phải tra nhanh cái đó.
translations.ar: يجب أن أتحقق من ذلك بسرعة.
translations.nl: Ik moet dat snel even opzoeken.
translations.hi: मुझे इसे जल्दी देख लेना है.
translations.nb: Jeg må slå det opp kjapt.
translations.sv: Jag måste kolla upp det snabbt.
translations.da: Jeg skal lige hurtigt slå det op.
translations.ja: それをすぐ調べないといけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses necessity.
Demonstrative pronoun (accusative neuter sg) functioning as the direct object of the infinitive verb.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates manner/brief duration.
Bare infinitive of the separable verb nach|schlagen; lexical verb governed by the modal (not separated here).

translations.en: He wants to look up the meaning.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn tra ý nghĩa.
translations.ar: هو يريد أن يبحث عن المعنى.

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses volition.
Definite article marking the following noun (accusative singular feminine).
Common noun; head of the NP serving as the direct object of the infinitive verb.
Bare infinitive of separable verb nach|schlagen; lexical verb governed by the modal.

sentences.target: Du kannst die Adresse gleich nachschlagen.

translations.de: Du kannst die Adresse gleich nachschlagen.
translations.en: You can look up the address right away.
translations.es: Puedes buscar la dirección ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Tu peux chercher l’adresse tout de suite.
translations.ko: 너는 주소를 바로 찾아볼 수 있어.
translations.pt: Você pode procurar o endereço agora mesmo.
translations.he: אתה יכול לבדוק את הכתובת מיד.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể tra địa chỉ ngay.
translations.nl: Je kunt het adres meteen opzoeken.
translations.hi: तुम पता तुरंत देख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να ψάξεις τη διεύθυνση αμέσως.
translations.nb: Du kan slå opp adressen med en gang.
translations.sv: Du kan kolla upp adressen direkt.
translations.ro: Poți să cauți adresa chiar acum.
translations.da: Du kan slå adressen op med det samme.
translations.ja: 住所はすぐ調べられるよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 2nd sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses ability/permission.
Definite article marking the following noun (accusative singular feminine).
Common noun; head of the NP serving as the direct object of the infinitive verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates immediacy.
Bare infinitive of separable verb nach|schlagen; lexical verb governed by the modal.

sentences.target: Wir sollen die Zugzeiten online nachschlagen.

translations.de: Wir sollen die Zugzeiten online nachschlagen.
translations.en: We’re supposed to look up the train times online.
translations.es: Se supone que debemos consultar los horarios de tren en internet.
translations.fr: On est censés vérifier les horaires de train en ligne.
translations.it: Dovremmo cercare gli orari dei treni online.
translations.ko: 우리는 기차 시간을 온라인에서 찾아보라고 되어 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们应该在网上查火车时刻。
translations.yue: 我哋應該上網查火車時間。
translations.ru: Нам следует посмотреть расписание поездов онлайн.
translations.pt: Devemos consultar os horários dos trens online.
translations.he: אנחנו אמורים לבדוק את זמני הרכבות באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Bọn mình phải tra giờ tàu trên mạng.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن نبحث عن مواعيد القطارات على الإنترنت.
translations.nl: We moeten de treintijden online opzoeken.
translations.uk: Нам слід переглянути розклад поїздів онлайн.
translations.hu: Elvileg a vonatmenetrendet online kell megnéznünk.
translations.hi: हमें ऑनलाइन ट्रेन के समय देखना है.
translations.pl: Powinniśmy sprawdzić rozkłady pociągów w internecie.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ψάξουμε τα δρομολόγια των τρένων στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Vi skal slå opp togtidene på nett.
translations.id: Kita seharusnya mencari jadwal kereta secara online.
translations.sv: Vi ska kolla upp tågtiderna online.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să căutăm orarele trenurilor online.
translations.cs: Máme si online vyhledat jízdní řády vlaků.
translations.da: Vi skal slå togtiderne op online.
translations.fi: Meidän pitäisi katsoa junien aikataulut netistä.
translations.ja: 電車の時刻はオンラインで調べることになっている。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses obligation/expectation.
Definite article marking the following noun (accusative plural).
Common noun (plural); head of the NP serving as the direct object of the infinitive verb.
Adverb specifying the manner/medium of the action (performed via the internet).
Bare infinitive of separable verb nach|schlagen; lexical verb governed by the modal.
